Horloger · Genève

02
"Only
the present
moment has
a meaning."

— Ludovic Ballouard

03

The Signature

The Upside Down

Twelve hours. Eleven inverted. Only the present is readable.

04
BALLOUARD · GENÈVE · BALLOUARD · GENÈVE · 

Philosophy

In a world consumed by measuring what has passed and predicting what will come, Ludovic Ballouard builds instruments that honour only what is. Each timepiece dismantles the tyranny of the clock — so that time is never counted, only inhabited.

05

The Atelier

Hand-engraved
in Geneva

Every component shaped by hand. Movements finished to a standard that exists for no audience but the watchmaker and the owner. This is conversation between artisan and material.

06
